major_tropes: The Masquerade — magical world hidden from mundane
Moral Ambiguity — the hero does dark things for right reasons
Ticking Clock — a catastrophe only the hero can stop
plot_template: A disgraced or outcast protagonist uncovers a conspiracy within a magical or fantastical power structure, is forced to operate outside the law, and must sacrifice something personal to expose the truth before an irreversible event occurs.
world_building_notes: Magic should have hard rules and costs. Power structures mirror real-world political corruption. Setting should feel lived-in and gritty, not glamorous.
emotional_core: Betrayal, justice at personal cost, found family vs. institution
